headline: Open interest on BlackRock's bitcoin ETF options reaches new heights
summary: Scott Melker, the host of "The Wolf of All Streets" podcast, discusses open interest on options for BlackRock's (BLK) spot bitcoin ETF (BTC-USD), which comes as bitcoin ETF inflows draw in over $2.1 billion in the last 9 trading days. "The Daily Wolf with Scott Melker" airs on Yahoo Finance every day at 12:00 p.m. Tune in for your daily dose of all things crypto. Make sure to also check out Yahoo Finance's new crypto hub to find the latest crypto-related news.

headline: Vinson & Elkins Expands Corporate Practice With 4 New Partners in Denver & D.C.
summary: Keith Trammell, Chalyse Robinson, David Strong, and Alex Bahn By Karen Roman Vinson & Elkins said Keith Trammell, Chalyse Robinson and David Strong joined the firm in Denver and Alex Bahn entered its office in Washington, D.C. Trammell, Robinson, and Strong will also work in the firm’s New York practice. The new partners previously served at WilmerHale and have […] The post Vinson & Elkins Expands Corporate Practice With 4 New Partners in Denver & D.C. appeared first on CorpGov.

headline: BlackRock vs. Schwab: One Financial Dividend Is Built to Last a Generation
summary: BlackRock (NYSE: BLK) and Charles Schwab (NYSE: SCHW) reported first quarter earnings this month, revealing two very different financial businesses with nearly identical market caps but sharply contrasting dividend stories. One is a fee-compounding asset management machine. The other is a brokerage and banking hybrid mid-recovery. Both raised their dividends. The gap in durability is ...
